# Horizon Capital Real Estate

> Real estate investment and property management firm focused on the Cleveland, Ohio metropolitan area.

Horizon Capital Real Estate LLC acquires and manages residential properties in the Cleveland metro area. The strategy is centered on long-term value creation, maximizing returns through consistent execution, data-driven analysis, and on-the-ground market insights.

## Strategy

- Primary market: Cleveland, Ohio metropolitan area
- Focus: Identifying properties with clear upside potential in high-demand areas
- Approach: Data-driven analysis combined with AI tools and local market expertise
- Goal: Long-term capital growth for the firm and its partners

## Contact

- Email: contact@horizoncapitalassets.com
- Website: https://horizoncapitalassets.com
